© DYNNI 2026

Glimt — Terms

Last updated: 23 June 2026

Welcome to Glimt. By creating an account or using the app, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please don't use Glimt.

Who can use Glimt

You must be at least 13 years old (or older where your country requires it). By using Glimt you confirm you meet this requirement.

Your account

You're responsible for keeping your login secure and for the activity on your account. Don't impersonate others or use someone else's account.

Acceptable use and zero tolerance for objectionable content

Glimt has zero tolerance for objectionable content and abusive behaviour. You agree not to use Glimt to:

  • share sexual content involving minors, or any content that sexually exploits or endangers children (we report this to the authorities, see our Child Safety Standards);
  • harass, bully, threaten, or impersonate anyone;
  • share content that is illegal, hateful, violent, or sexually explicit;
  • send spam or attempt to harm, reverse engineer, or disrupt the service.

Reporting and blocking. You can block any user and report any glimt or user from inside the app. Because content is end-to-end encrypted, reporting a glimt attaches a copy of that content to the report so our moderators can review it. We review reports and act within 24 hours, removing content and ejecting users who violate these terms. Accounts that are reported by multiple people are hidden automatically while we review.

By using Glimt you consent to this moderation process, which exists to keep everyone safe.

Your content

You own the content you create. You grant us only the limited, technical permission needed to store and deliver your encrypted content to the recipients you choose. Since content is end-to-end encrypted, we cannot access it; we act on it only when you attach it to a report.

The service

Glimt is provided "as is". We work hard to keep it running and private, but we can't guarantee it will always be available or error-free. Glimt is ephemeral by design: content is meant to disappear, and we are not a backup service. To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for lost content or indirect damages.

Ending your use

You can delete your account at any time from Settings. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, especially the zero-tolerance rules above.

Changes

We may update these terms; we'll update the date above and notify you in the app of significant changes. Continued use after a change means you accept the updated terms.

Contact

paal@dynni.no
